paper.title: Magnetoelectric and Multiferroic Properties of BaTiO3/NiFe2O4/BaTiO3 Heterostructured Thin Films Grown by Pulsed Laser Deposition Technique

figure.description: Polarization-Electric Field Hysteresis loop of (BTO/NFO/BTO) tri-layered thin film

digitization.method: direct pixel digitization from Figure 7 with axis-center detection and calibrated scale fit
notes: Blue hysteresis trace extracted from raster image, branch envelopes sampled and merged into a major-loop path.
Scale factors calibrated from extracted loop crossings with explicit uncertainty bounds retained below.

uncertainty.notes: Conservative uncertainty envelope for full-figure raster extraction where axis-center and line-thickness ambiguity dominate absolute scaling. Bounds are used to derive dataset-specific falsification tolerances.
